memory_entries.text: SQLite product review DB mapping: g1 is Office Products (items_g1 main_cat mostly Office Products), g2 is electronics (items_g2 mostly Computers/All Electronics), likely g3 musical instruments. Tables: fdbk_g1 has id, item_id (non-primary product identifier), ref_id (FK to items_g1), uid, rtg, ttl, body, ts, hlp_ct, vrf; items_g1 keyed by ref_id. For Office Products low-star reviews (fdbk_g1 where rtg <= 2.0), COUNT(DISTINCT item_id)=10059, COUNT(DISTINCT ref_id)=8227, difference=1832.
